items.description: very notable trajectory comparison writeup here buried in the RLM paper from @a1zhang and @lateinteraction. an open secret of "frontier" model training is that even without training on test, you can basically cheat by training on test look…
items.description_zh: 非常值得注意的轨迹比较文章埋藏在 @a1zhang 和 @lateinteraction 的 RLM 论文中。 “前沿”模型训练的一个公开的秘密是，即使没有测试训练，你基本上也可以通过测试外观训练来作弊……

items.title: Use one agent to do the work and another to review it against a rubric.
items.title_zh: 使用一名代理来完成工作，另一名代理根据标准进行审查。
items.description: Use one agent to do the work and another to review it against a rubric. @trq212 explains how this works for video shorts: ���For something like, ‘Is this a good video short or not?’ you don’t have a deterministic answer. You should have a…
items.description_zh: 使用一名代理来完成工作，另一名代理根据标准进行审查。 @trq212 解释了这对于视频短片的作用：“对于诸如‘这是一个好的视频短片吗？’之类的问题，你没有确定的答案。你应该有一个……

items.title: The road to AGI is paved with economically valuable tasks.
items.title_zh: 通向通用人工智能的道路是由具有经济价值的任务铺成的。
items.description: The road to AGI is paved with economically valuable tasks. That’s why enterprise AI is one of the most important frontiers. It’s where many of those tasks live.
items.description_zh: 通向通用人工智能的道路是由具有经济价值的任务铺成的。这就是为什么企业人工智能是最重要的前沿之一。这是许多任务所在的地方。

meta.bio: Sr Director, AI at Meta; Prev: Google - Led Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.

items.title: Four years post peak web3 and crypto tokenomics debates… turns out the tokenomics debate…
items.title_zh: web3 和加密代币经济学辩论高峰四年后……结果是代币经济学辩论……
items.description: Four years post peak web3 and crypto tokenomics debates… turns out the tokenomics debate that matters is open vs closed weight, inference costs and model routing. https://t.co/THz3HEyx1d
items.description_zh: Web3 和加密货币代币经济学辩论达到顶峰四年后……事实证明，重要的代币经济学辩论是开放与封闭权重、推理成本和模型路由。 https://t.co/THz3HEyx1d

items.title: The big lesson from AI is that everything is code.
items.title_zh: 人工智能的重要教训是一切都是代码。
items.description: The big lesson from AI is that everything is code. A slide deck is code. Design is code. That cool promo video? Code. Excel automation? Code. The universe? Probably made of code too.
items.description_zh: 人工智能的重要教训是一切都是代码。幻灯片就是代码。设计就是代码。那个很酷的宣传视频？代码。 Excel 自动化？代码。宇宙？可能也是由代码组成的。
